name: SERGEANT || Anders Welsht
description:
—protective puppy.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

a man of discipline and order, Anders prides himself in being a protective husband, on helping his wife as much as possible without being asked to.

𓏵· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·𓏵

from the Salisian War series.

other bots in the series:

  • Minerva Phaendris (Chief of Navy, Maridan Military Unit)

  • Mooru Kalle (General, Maridan Military Unit)

  • Nao Yushimo (warrant officer, Yuelian Defence Forces)

he’s just a little guy i’m afraid

as much as i love women, i do have a soft spot for chivalrous, large gentlemen. also this was a draft i just finished, not a request. just wanted to get this out of my hair before i forget abt it completely
